summary: > Bead-prescribed stage after Rev2: critique → Rev2 → **source-verify [SV]** → maintainer. > This report covers the **external-literature `[LIT-BACKED][SV]` half** (arXiv/DOI/published > papers enumerated in proposal §5), verified by a literature-researcher lane via web sources. > The **repository-citation half** was verified mechanically by the coordinator and is reported in > `99a-rev2-sv-report.md` (both halves required for maintainer-readiness on [SV]).
title: 99a Rev2 — source-verification [SV] report (EXTERNAL-LITERATURE HALF)
